{"id":1425920428,"question_id":724,"lang":"cpp","lang_name":"C++","time":"5 days, 23 hours","timestamp":1729212846,"status":11,"status_display":"Wrong Answer","runtime":"N/A","url":"/submissions/detail/1425920428/","is_pending":"Not Pending","title":"Find Pivot Index","memory":"N/A","code":"class Solution {\npublic:\n    int pivotIndex(vector<int>& nums) {\n        int size = nums.size();\n        int mid = size / 2;\n        int left_sum=0, right_sum = 0;\n        for(int i = 0;i<mid;i++) {\n            left_sum += nums[i];\n        }\n        for(int i = mid+1;i<size;i++) {\n            right_sum += nums[i];\n        }\n        while(mid >= 0 && mid < size-1) {\n            if(left_sum == right_sum) {\n                return mid;\n            }\n            if(left_sum < right_sum) {\n                left_sum += nums[mid];\n                right_sum -= nums[mid+1];\n                mid = mid + 1;\n            } else if(left_sum > right_sum) {\n                right_sum += nums[mid];\n                left_sum -= nums[mid-1];\n                mid = mid - 1;\n            }\n        }\n        return -1;\n    }\n};","compare_result":"","title_slug":"find-pivot-index","has_notes":false,"flag_type":1}
